title: NovaCraft
body:
🌿 NovaCraft | A Better, More Beautiful Minecraft !

🔹 NovaCraft is designed to enhance your Minecraft experience without straying too far from the vanilla feel. With improved visuals, better performance, and immersive new features, this pack makes the game more stunning and enjoyable than ever !



✨ What Makes This Pack Special ?

🔹 Enhanced Graphics & Atmosphere 🎨

Stunning shaders (Iris, Complementary Reimagined, Solas) for realistic lighting and reflections.
High-resolution textures (Faithful 64x, Patrix, ModernArch) to make every block look sharper.
Immersive sounds (Dynamic Surroundings, Sound Physics Remastered) for a richer world.

🔹 Optimized Performance 🚀

Sodium, Lithium, FerriteCore, Krypton boost FPS and reduce lag.
Dynamic FPS helps keep things smooth even when you're tabbed out.
Entity Culling optimizes rendering for better performance.

🔹 Better Animations & Physics 🎭

Fresh Animations & Not Enough Animations make mobs feel alive.
Physics Mod & Physical Falling Trees add realistic movement to the world.
Do a Barrel Roll lets you dodge in combat like a pro !

🔹 More to Explore & Build 🏞️

Terralith & Tectonic bring breathtaking landscapes.
Additional Structures makes the world feel more dynamic.
Better Lanterns, More Chest Variants add decorative variety.

🔹 Improved UI & Quality of Life 🖥️

BetterF3 gives a cleaner and more readable debug screen.
Jade helps you identify blocks and entities at a glance.
Mod Menu makes managing your mods a breeze.

💡 If you love Minecraft but want a smoother, more immersive, and visually stunning experience, this is the modpack for you !
